description: A World subclass that provides helpers for interacting with the rule builder

mhfu_0.0.1.title: Monster Hunter Freedom Unite APWorld v0.0.1

mhfu_0.0.2.description:
# Bug Fixes
* Actually implement quest deathlink (it was left unimplemented intentionally but I forgot to remove the option)
* Fix a set of errors caused by quest randomization being disabled
* Fix deathlink tracking whether or not you are walking, rather than if you carted
* Fix incorrect pointers for US and EU versions of the game
* Fixed *many* quests not being registered by the client

# Other Changes
* Enabling Cash Only Equipment will now attempt to put the next rank's equipment in the pool if there is space (in place of standard filler items).
mhfu_0.0.2.title: Monster Hunter Freedom Unite APWorld v0.0.2
